entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: “Do Not Track” Signals පිළිබඳ අපගේ Policy:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: අපගේ Service ඔබට certain information, text, graphics, videos, හෝ වෙනත් material (“Content”) post, link, store, share, සහ වෙනත් ලෙස make available කිරීමට ඉඩ දෙයි. ඔබ Service මත හෝ Service හරහා post කරන Content සඳහා, එහි legality, reliability, සහ appropriateness ඇතුළුව, ඔබ වගකිව යුතුය. Service මත හෝ හරහා Content post කිරීමෙන්, ඔබ නියෝජනය කර warrant කරන්නේ: (i) Content ඔබේම බව (ඔබ එය own කරන බව) සහ/හෝ ඔබට එය භාවිතා කිරීමටත් මෙම Terms හි සඳහන් rights සහ license අපට grant කිරීමටත් right ඇති බව, සහ (ii) Service මත හෝ හරහා ඔබේ Content post කිරීම කිසිදු පුද්ගලයෙකුගේ හෝ entity එකක privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights, හෝ වෙනත් rights උල්ලංඝනය නොකරන බවයි. copyright infringe කරන බව සොයාගත් ඕනෑම කෙනෙකුගේ account terminate කිරීමට අපි right reserve කරමු. Service මත හෝ හරහා ඔබ submit, post, හෝ display කරන Content සඳහා ඔබේ සියලු rights ඔබ retain කරන අතර, ඒ rights protect කිරීම ඔබේ වගකීමයි. ඔබ හෝ third party කෙනෙකු Service මත හෝ හරහා post කරන Content සඳහා අපි responsibility හෝ liability නොගනිමු. කෙසේ වෙතත් Service භාවිතයෙන් Content post කිරීමෙන්, එවැනි Content Service මත සහ හරහා use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, සහ distribute කිරීමට ඔබ අපට right සහ license grant කරයි. මෙම license එකට ඔබේ Content Service හි වෙනත් users වෙත make available කිරීමට අපට right ඇතුළත් බව ඔබ එකඟ වේ; ඔවුන්ටද මෙම Terms යටතේ ඔබේ Content භාවිතා කළ හැක. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ට users විසින් provide කරන සියලු Content monitor සහ edit කිරීමට right ඇති නමුත් obligation නැත. තවද, මෙම Service මත හෝ හරහා සොයාගන්නා Content Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) හි property හෝ permission සමඟ භාවිතා කරන Content වේ. අපගේ express advance written permission නොමැතිව, commercial purposes හෝ personal gain සඳහා, said Content සම්පූර්ණයෙන් හෝ කොටසක් ලෙස distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, හෝ use කළ නොහැක.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Parents බොහෝ විට take over නොකර help කිරීමට උත්සාහ කරයි. inspir families ට learning behavior visible කරන public modes දෙයි: hints, questions, explain-back, review, සහ study planning.

entries.source: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: ප්‍රශ්නයක්, ඔබේ පිළිතුර සහ ඔබ සතුව ඇත්නම් අපේක්ෂිත පිළිතුර අලවන්න. ඔබේ සහකරු තර්කය පැහැදිලි කරන අතර ඊළඟ වතාවේ එම වැරැද්දම සිදු නොවීමට ඔබට උපකාර කරයි.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, සහ වෙනත් deep questions careful reasoning හරහා explore කරන්න.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.

entries.value: ශිෂ්‍ය සාකච්ඡා වඩාත් ප්‍රයෝජනවත් වන පරිදි පැහැදිලි සංසද ප්‍රශ්න, පිළිතුරු, සාරාංශ සහ පසු විපරම් ඉල්ලීම් සකස් කරන්න.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: විභාගයකට සූදානම් වන්න

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: active recall සමඟ exam එකකට prepare වන්න

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: මුඛ පරීක්ෂණ සඳහා සූදානම් වන්න

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: oral questioning සඳහා prepare වන්න.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: පාසල්, සීමාවාසික, රැකියා හෝ ශිෂ්‍යත්ව සම්මුඛ පරීක්ෂණ සඳහා යථාර්ථවාදී ප්‍රශ්න සහ ප්‍රතිපෝෂණ සමඟ සූදානම් වන්න.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: realistic questioning හරහා learners oral exams සඳහා prepare කරන්න.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: ප්‍රේරක, කාලය සහ ව්‍යුහය පිළිබඳ ප්‍රතිපෝෂණ සමඟ කතා, ඉදිරිපත් කිරීම්, සම්මුඛ පරීක්ෂණ හෝ වාචික විභාග සඳහා සූදානම් වන්න.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: පන්තියේ මිතුරන් හෝ කණ්ඩායමක් සඳහා අධ්‍යයන සම්පත් සූදානම් කරන්න: සාරාංශ, සබැඳි, සටහන්, පැහැදිලි කිරීම් සහ භාවිතය පිළිබඳ මගපෙන්වීම්.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: learner topic sequence දන්නා විට prepared courses, videos, සහ exercises ශක්තිමත්ම වේ.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: argument එකක් present කරන්න, rebuttal සඳහා wait කරන්න, weak spots identify කරන්න, සහ learner's reasoning strengthen කරන්න.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: evidence present කරන්න, decisions අහන්න, consequences reveal කරන්න, සහ principles debrief කරන්න.

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Private saved chat URLs sitemap-listed නොවන අතර llms.txt, llms-full.txt, හෝ JSON AI content catalog තුළ ඇතුළත් නොවේ.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Private tutoring බලවත්ය, නමුත් එය සමානව available නොවේ. free public AI learning platform එකක් වැඩි දෙනෙකුට learn කිරීමට patient first place එකක් දීමෙන් එම access gap අඩු කිරීමට උදව් කළ හැක.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Private tutoring බලවත්ය, නමුත් unevenly distributed වේ. learner active තබාගෙන access widen කිරීමට inspir AI භාවිතා කරයි: answers ට පෙර hints, lectures ට පෙර questions, සහ explanation පසු practice.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Project Coach AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: school, creative, coding, හෝ personal project එකක් scope, milestones, blockers, සහ next actions සමඟ plan කරන්න.
